description: Operational overview for Kedify, KEDA, ScaledObjects, target workloads, ScalingPolicies, PodResourceProfiles, PodResourceAutoscalers, and the HTTP add-on.

panels.description: Health of Kedify components, as reported by the Kedify agent.
panels.title: Components

panels.description: ScaledObject count from KEDA operator metrics, falling back to kube-state-metrics CRD metrics.
panels.title: ScaledObjects

panels.description: Per-component health and version reported by kedify_agent_component_up.
panels.title: Component Status

panels.description: Agent control-plane traffic by message type and success flag.
panels.title: Agent gRPC Rate

panels.description: ScaledObject to scaleTargetRef mapping from kube-state-metrics custom resource metrics.
panels.title: Scaled Objects

panels.description: Current scaler metric value used by KEDA/HPA. This series appears when KEDA has produced scaler metric samples.
panels.title: Scaler Metric Values

panels.description: Deployment replica gauges joined with ScaledObject target metadata.
panels.title: Target Deployment Replicas

panels.description: Per ScalingPolicy active and paused state.
panels.title: ScalingPolicy State

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, name, result) (rate(kedify_agent_prp_reconcile_count{kedify_agent_id=~"$agent",namespace=~"$namespace",name=~"$prp"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)
sum by (namespace, name, resource, side, direction) (rate(kedify_agent_pra_scale_decisions_total{kedify_agent_id=~"$agent",namespace=~"$namespace",name=~"$pra"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, namespace, name, direction) (rate(kedify_agent_pra_time_to_apply_seconds_bucket{kedify_agent_id=~"$agent",namespace=~"$namespace",name=~"$pra"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.description: Absolute delta p95. CPU is millicores, memory is MiB.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, namespace, name, resource, side, direction) (rate(kedify_agent_pra_scale_delta_absolute_bucket{kedify_agent_id=~"$agent",namespace=~"$namespace",name=~"$pra"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: PRA Scale Delta p95

title: Kedify / KEDA Installation
